startingCommit: df98f1fe0296ffa10b795b520ea8e97cd679f7ab Add read-only config graph detection
goal: Add a read-only connected-files review list to the Config page using the existing config graph engine, without enabling file picking, profile switching, layered writes, or runtime/config mutation.
uiChanges: Replaced the previous Connected files summary-only section with a read-only connected-files review section.
The section still shows friendly graph summary copy.
Each detected connected file is shown as a read-only card with a role label, path, optional symlink target, readable state, and hint labels.
Unreadable files, cycles, unsupported source patterns, and generated/script-managed hints are shown as friendly warnings.
The connected-files future action remains disabled and is now labeled Choose review mode (planned).
issueWarnings: Some connected files could not be read.
Some connected files refer back to each other.
The app stopped following them to avoid looping.
Some connected file patterns are not shown yet.
Review carefully before editing these files in a future version.
graphEngineChanges: No graph engine changes were required; the UI uses the existing read-only ConfigGraphSummary and ConfigGraphFile fields.
testsAdded: Updated tests/dashboard_config_page_scaffold.rs for the renamed disabled connected-files future action.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with current sprint changes plus pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts intentionally left uncommitted

proofStillMissing: Real manual file picker UI is not implemented.
Layered write-target selection is not implemented.
Connected-files review is display-only and does not yet offer a detailed file browser or write target choices.
nextRecommendedSprint: Add a read-only connected-file detail view or review mode that lets users inspect detected file roles, unreadable files, and management hints before implementing any file picker or write-target selection.
